mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.category_id, c.code as category_code, c.name as category_name, i.code, i.name, i.description, i.sort_order, i.status, i.extra, i.created_at, i.updated_at FROM dict_item i LEFT JOIN dict_category c ON i.category_id = c.id ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, i.sort_order ASC, i.id ASC

SELECT i.id, i.category_id, c.code as category_code, c.name as category_name, i.code, i.name, i.description, i.sort_order, i.status, i.extra, i.created_at, i.updated_at FROM dict_item i LEFT JOIN dict_category c ON i.category_id = c.id WHERE i.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY i.sort_order ASC, i.id ASC

SELECT i.id, i.category_id, c.code as category_code, c.name as category_name, i.code, i.name, i.description, i.sort_order, i.status, i.extra, i.created_at, i.updated_at FROM dict_item i LEFT JOIN dict_category c ON i.category_id = c.id WHERE i.category_id = #{categoryId} AND i.status = 1 ORDER BY i.sort_order ASC, i.id ASC

SELECT i.id, i.category_id, c.code as category_code, c.name as category_name, i.code, i.name, i.description, i.sort_order, i.status, i.extra, i.created_at, i.updated_at FROM dict_item i LEFT JOIN dict_category c ON i.category_id = c.id WHERE i.id = #{id}

SELECT i.id, i.category_id, c.code as category_code, c.name as category_name, i.code, i.name, i.description, i.sort_order, i.status, i.extra, i.created_at, i.updated_at FROM dict_item i LEFT JOIN dict_category c ON i.category_id = c.id WHERE i.category_id = #{categoryId} AND i.code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dict_item (category_id, code, name, description, sort_order, status, extra) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{extra})
mapper.update: UPDATE dict_item SET category_id = #{categoryId}, code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, extra = #{extra} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE dict_item SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dict_item WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}

SELECT i.id, i.category_id, c.code as category_code, c.name as category_name, i.code, i.name, i.description, i.sort_order, i.status, i.extra, i.created_at, i.updated_at FROM dict_item i LEFT JOIN dict_category c ON i.category_id = c.id WHERE i.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, i.sort_order ASC
